female_female_dialogue_examples:
ATHENA: From back in Houston. We both come up on Fifth Street.
PRISCILLA WORTH: Did you know he was going to be there last night?
ATHENA: If I had I wouldn't have gone in.
PRISCILLA WORTH: And you and Private Graves--
ATHENA: We were just dancing--

non_male_topic_examples:
PRISCILLA WORTH: Report to Dr. Innis at the clinic.
ATHENA: I'm feeling okay--
PRISCILLA WORTH: I'm very happy to hear that, Private. Now you go put some pee-pee in a cup for Dr. Innis and I'll be feeling okay, too.
